# Tables and Links

## Simple table

| Column A | Column B | Column C |
| -------- | -------- | -------- |
| Row 1    | Data     | Value    |
| Row 2    | More     | Info     |

## Table with alignment

| Left | Center | Right |
| :--- | :----: | ----: |
| L1   |   C1   |    R1 |
| L2   |   C2   |    R2 |

## Links

Visit [the homepage](https://example.com) for details.

[Reference-style link][ref] and [another][ref2].

[ref]: https://example.com/docs "Documentation"
[ref2]: https://example.com/api "API Reference"
